extDesc.message: Download entire ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini conversations as Markdown files — code blocks and images included.

hintFreeInput.message: Type your vault's actual folder names (free text, nested paths OK). A typo silently creates a new folder — double-check spelling.

hintVaultRoot.message: Set Chrome's download location to your vault root. (Extensions cannot write outside the download folder.)

errUnsupported.message:
This page isn't supported, or needs a refresh.
Supported: chatgpt.com · claude.ai · gemini.google.com

errNoTurns.message: Couldn't find any conversation. Open a conversation and try again.
